## Security and Privacy Checklist

Required if this PR touches workspace files, profile data, MCP, storage, logs, or imports/exports.

- [ ] Does not expose workspace data across unrelated workspaces
- [ ] Does not expose sensitive profile fields by default
- [ ] Does not log secrets or private profile data
- [ ] Handles path traversal or unsafe file paths
- [ ] Keeps MCP tools read-only unless explicitly reviewed
- [ ] Includes privacy warnings or redaction where needed
- [ ] Updates `SECURITY.md` if security behavior changed
